title: Equipment Insulation
full_text:
6.2.2.2 Equipment Insulation
Equipment Insulation
1) Except for tanks covered by Article 6.2.2.1., hot service water storage tanks shall
be covered with insulation having a maximum U-value of 0.45 W/(m2×K).
2) Tank insulation referred to in Sentence (1) that is installed in areas where it may
be subject to mechanical damage shall be protected.

sentences.text: Except for tanks covered by Article 6.2.2.1., hot service water storage tanks shall be covered with insulation having a maximum U-value of 0.45 W/(m2×K).
Tank insulation referred to in Sentence (1) that is installed in areas where it may be subject to mechanical damage shall be protected.
